title: Melted Dutch Blue Cheese Casserole
description: A briny, crumbly Dutch blue cheese casserole infused with Thai sweet basil and horapa sauce, steam cooked in a bamboo steamer for a quick weeknight vegetarian meal.
instructions: Preheat bamboo steamer over medium heat.
In a small bowl, whisk horapa sauce with vegetable stock, salt, pepper, and sesame oil.
Gently toss tofu cubes in the sauce mixture until evenly coated.
Place the seasoned tofu and crumbled Dutch blue cheese in a heat‑proof dish that fits the steamer.
Sprinkle chopped Thai sweet basil on top of the cheese layer.
Cover the dish with a lid and steam for 12 minutes until cheese has melted and tofu is heated through.
Remove the casserole from the steamer and let it rest for 2 minutes.
Garnish with a few extra basil leaves and a pinch of red pepper flakes if desired.
Serve hot over steamed rice or with crusty bread.
